featured.title: What I've Built
featured.subtitle: Projects that solve real problems and are currently running in production.

presentation.intro_text: Specialized in the design and deployment of end-to-end architectures for the private sector. My approach combines the rigor of Computer Engineering with the technical agility required to implement REST APIs, automation systems (scraping), and high-availability management panels. My priority is delivering robust, documented, and scalable software.
presentation.intro_b1: Backend first: clear API design, robust validation, and well-structured databases.
presentation.intro_b2: Usable Frontend: clean, responsive interfaces with a great user experience.
presentation.intro_b3: Professional delivery: documentation, basic testing, and functional deployment.

ucasal.title: Computer Engineering
highlights: Team development with Git and agile methodologies

about.heading: Building efficient and scalable solutions.
about.context: Professional background, technical focus, and what I can bring to your team.
about.p1: I am a Full-Stack developer with a strong focus on Backend. My goal is not just to write code, but to design efficient, scalable, and easy-to-maintain systems. I am currently pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering, which allows me to combine the agility of modern development with a solid foundation in algorithms, data structures, and software engineering principles.
about.p2: I firmly believe in collective growth and knowledge sharing. That is why I am an active member and organizer at SaltaDev, collaborating in tech event planning and sharing experiences to strengthen Salta's technological ecosystem.

card1.title: Backend Architecture
card1.text: Designing RESTful APIs under scalability standards, utilizing optimized data structures and robust business logic. Specialized in high-performance ecosystems with Python (FastAPI) and Node.js (Express).

card2.title: Professional Implementation
card2.text: Full lifecycle in production environments for real clients. Experience in managing technical requirements, meeting critical deadlines, and post-launch support to ensure operational stability.

card3.title: Engineering Judgment
card3.text: Constant academic training applied to development. My focus is on understanding technical fundamentals and the 'why' behind every architectural decision, prioritizing software quality over speed.
